# Convai
**URL:** https://convai.com
**Page Title:** Convai - Conversational AI for Virtual Worlds
--------------------


## Conversational AI Characters

Real-time Perception and action abilities
Rated #1 by Developers
Role-play AI Avatars
XR Training Simulations
Social Worlds and Gaming
Scroll to discover
What do we believe in?

## We humans understand the world through our body. For AI to achieve a similar depth of understanding, it must also be embodied and have spatial intelligence.

How it works

## We are enabling people to craft such spatially 3D aware characters by making an intuitive extremely easy to use platform with the best in class developer support

Craft Character's Mind
Embody The Mind Within An Avatar
Deploy The Avatar In A Custom Environment
Craft Character Mind
1/3
Embody the Mind
2/3
Deploy in your own custom environment
3/3

## Meet Jake

Created by Noyonika
Start Experience

## The simplest and easiest platform to craft and deploy 3D AI characters

Convai powers XR worlds with conversational AI through both virtual humans and disembodied AI characters, enabling deeply interactive and immersive experiences. Its platform enables the creation of lifelike 3D AI characters (virtual humans) that can interact through natural language and realistic behaviors within virtual environments. These embodied AI agents possess multimodal perception – they can see and hear their surroundings and then respond with human-like dialogue, voice, gestures, and contextually appropriate actions.
Learn more
Creators

## For Creators

Leverage Convai’s no-code creation tools, right from the browser or your local system, to create high-quality, character-driven, or spatial experiences.
Learn more
Developers

## For Developers

Convai provides integrations with all popular game engines, such as Unreal Engine, Unity, 3JS, and more, with its plugins, open APIs, tutorials, extensive documentation, and comprehensive support.
Learn more

## Convai AI features

Features

Complex Actions
Craft characters with roles and objectives
Upload all kinds of documents to add to character’s knowledge
Design your custom narrative flow
65+ languages and 500+ voices to choose from for your characters
Enable webcam based or PoV vision
Accurate lip sync and facial animations for life like characters.
Choose from a vast animation set or add custom ones via Convai’s XR animation app
Let characters perform complex actions through a sequence of animations

## Integrations

### Game Engines

Deep integration with all the popular Game Engines
Highest-rated developer platform for crafting embodied conversational AI characters with advanced multimodal perception abilities

### Avatar Systems

Avatar agnostic but supports all major avatar systems

### Platforms

Platform, device, and OS agnostic but supported on all

01.

## Learning & training

Transform training with interactive, role-playing AI characters for immersive learning experiences.
The highest-rated developer platform for crafting non-player characters (NPCs) with advanced multimodal perception abilities in 3D game engines.
Learn more
02.

## Brand Representative

Elevate customer engagement with dynamic AI brand ambassadors.
Your AI brand representative is available 24/7 to assist users and customers by answering queries about products, services, and the company with high accuracy and reliability.
Learn more
03.

## Social Virtual Worlds

Enhance your virtual worlds with lifelike AI characters that improve onboarding and boost engagement.
AI characters enhance engagement by serving as in-game companions, increase retention by successfully onboarding users, and personalize the experience to match individual preferences.
Learn more
